intro: Moquiniastrum densicephalum, also known as Chilca, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been reported to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
